proposal_summary: Drift Court recommends canonizing 'test_deviation' — frequency 90%, impact: positive. Requires operator approval to modify canonical template.
justification: Deviation 'test_deviation' has been observed with high frequency
Canonization would add this to the permanent template

expected_impact.description: Stabilizes the canonical template by incorporating a proven pattern

sandbox_preview.notes: Canonization is a template metadata change, no sandbox needed.
